title: ArrowFlight code uses harmful rand function
description:
### Describe the bug
Check the stack trace.
### How to reproduce
I created this table:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 LowCardinality(Int16), c1 Int32, c2 UInt128) ENGINE = ArrowFlight('arrowflight1:5005', '/aflight0');
```
While pointing to the server from `test_arrowflight_storage` test.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 TEXT, c1 INTEGER DEFAULT 0, c2 REAL);
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES ('test', 1, 1.5), (NULL, 2, 2.5), ('example', 3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT c0, c1 FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT c0, COUNT(*) FROM t1 GROUP BY c0 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT c1, SUM(c2) FROM t1 WHERE c1 IN (SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE c0 IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY c1;
key_bug_features: Using rand function in ArrowFlight engine
